activation_policy: Narrative beats are design bindings only. Their owner tasks author runtime content and activate maps through the existing campaign gates.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Toompea Castle (Toompea loss)
integrations.status_1343: A stark Danish stone castle on the hilltop; Tall Hermann tower is not built yet.
integrations.beat: Ultimate target of the St. George's Night Uprising; Danish viceroy and Order envoys hold court here.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|St. Mary's Cathedral (Toomkirik)
integrations.status_1343: Spiritual center of Toompea serving Danish and German elite since the 13th century.
integrations.beat: Ellen Luik aids families the Cathedral's formal charity overlooks.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Danish King's Garden (Taani Kuninga aed)
integrations.status_1343: Private elevated garden for Danish rulers, steeped in conquest mythology.
integrations.beat: Lower-town rebels look up at the garden as a symbol of foreign rule.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Toompea viewing platforms (Patkuli & Kohtuotsa)
integrations.status_1343: Unpaved ramparts and patrol walks on the castle's outer edge.
integrations.beat: Rebel scouts memorize sightlines from these heights before the siege.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Long Leg Gate (Pikk jalg värav)
integrations.status_1343: Heavily guarded stone gate controlling movement between All-linn and Toompea.
integrations.beat: Kaja times courier runs when the watch changes at dusk.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Short Leg Gate (Lühike jalg värav)
integrations.status_1343: A tight controlled stair under castle surveillance.
integrations.beat: Mart uses the passage when monastery contacts want no Viru Gate record.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Toompea eastern ramparts
integrations.status_1343: Curtain walls and timber hoardings facing the lower town.
integrations.beat: Danish archers train here during the April siege alarms.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Toompea western slope
integrations.status_1343: Open slope with orchards and service paths outside the main keep.
integrations.beat: Archbishop's household staff haul supplies along the western track.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Danish royal chapel site
integrations.status_1343: Small castle chapel serving the garrison and visiting envoys.
integrations.beat: Order clerics negotiate safe passage for hostages near this chapel.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Toompea well courtyard
integrations.status_1343: Castle well and storehouses for siege provisions.
integrations.beat: Rumors of hidden grain here fuel lower-town bread riots.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Toompea guard barracks
integrations.status_1343: Timber and stone barracks for Danish household troops.
integrations.beat: Captain Henning's superiors post elite squads on the hill.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Toompea powder store (ruin trace)
integrations.status_1343: Small magazine kept away from residential halls.
integrations.beat: A smith's botched hinge repair once nearly got Kalev questioned here.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Domberg lane houses
integrations.status_1343: Modest stone-and-timber homes of castle clerks and lesser nobles.
integrations.beat: Jürgen Witte courts officials who control harbor tariffs.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Toompea flag mast site
integrations.status_1343: Wooden signal mast; no tall tower yet.
integrations.beat: Rebels watch whether the Danish banner is lowered during parleys.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Toompea (Upper Town)|Castle south gate interior
integrations.status_1343: Inner gate separating keep from lower slope roads.
integrations.beat: Last checkpoint before messages reach the viceroy.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Tallinn Town Hall (Raekoda)
integrations.status_1343: Smaller stone-and-timber hall on site since at least 1322; no later tower.
integrations.beat: Hanseatic merchants like Jürgen Witte negotiate taxes and watch contracts here.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Town Hall Square (Raekoja plats)
integrations.status_1343: Packed market square with stalls, pillory site, and civic announcements.
integrations.beat: Kalev collects mundane city repair commissions announced from the steps.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Holy Spirit Church (Pühavaimu kirik)
integrations.status_1343: Modest chapel and almshouse recorded by 1316; no later tower or clock.
integrations.beat: Ellen Luik coordinates charity for women the almshouse turns away.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Town Hall Pharmacy (Raeapteek)
integrations.status_1343: A respected apothecary shop serving burghers and visiting merchants.
integrations.beat: Aita trades herbs here when monastery stock runs low.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Great Guild site (Suurgildi hoone)
integrations.status_1343: Wealthy merchants meet in simpler guild rooms; the later hall is not built.
integrations.beat: Jürgen Witte's faction pressures guild masters for armed escorts.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Brotherhood of Blackheads site
integrations.status_1343: Young unmarried merchants organize in rented rooms; no grand house yet.
integrations.beat: Mart hears Blackhead apprentices brag about rural unrest in taverns.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Civic weighing house
integrations.status_1343: Official scales for grain and wax duties.
integrations.beat: Disputes here spark fights Henning's watch must break up.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Pillory and punishment post
integrations.status_1343: Active stocks for petty thieves and rumor-mongers.
integrations.beat: A rebel sympathizer is displayed here days before St. George's Night.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Merchant beer cellar row
integrations.status_1343: Stone cellars storing Hanseatic beer and salt fish.
integrations.beat: Aita's brewery competes with imported Lübeck barrels.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Civic well (Raekoja)
integrations.status_1343: Primary draw point for market-day water.
integrations.beat: Children spread word of rural signal fires while fetching water.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Vana Turg lane
integrations.status_1343: Busy cart route for inland goods entering the market.
integrations.beat: Kaja slips messages into grain sacks along this lane.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|King's Street (Kuninga)
integrations.status_1343: Processional route for Danish envoys visiting the lower town.
integrations.beat: Guild banners are lowered here when Order knights ride through.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Harju gate approach (inner)
integrations.status_1343: Tax checkpoint before goods leave toward Paldiski road.
integrations.beat: Smugglers test Kalev's honesty with 'scrap iron' jobs.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Market weighbridge lane
integrations.status_1343: Clerks record Hanseatic wax and fur shipments.
integrations.beat: Jürgen Witte's ledgers hide rebel bribe lines in wax tallies.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Market and Civic Quarter|Civic notice board
integrations.status_1343: Painted ordinances on wood: curfew, grain prices, watch rotations.
integrations.beat: Mart copies watch rotations for rebel planners.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|St. Olaf's Church (Oleviste kirik)
integrations.status_1343: Active 13th-century church; west tower and vaulting reflect 1330-era work without the later giant spire.
integrations.beat: Mart meets contacts in Oleviste courtyard to trade whispers on the rural rebellion.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Pikk Street (Pikk tänav)
integrations.status_1343: Main Hanseatic artery lined with workshops and stone merchant houses.
integrations.beat: Jürgen Witte's warehouses dominate the harbor end.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|St. Olaf's guild workshops
integrations.status_1343: Metalworkers and ship chandlers under guild regulation.
integrations.beat: Kalev competes for city contracts against wealthier masters here.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Coastal Gate (Suur Rannavärav)
integrations.status_1343: Primary sea gate with timber palisades and a simpler stone portal.
integrations.beat: Harbor tolls are collected here; rebel scouts note guard rotations.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Harbor crane site
integrations.status_1343: Wooden treadwheel crane unloading cogs and barges.
integrations.beat: Salt and tar from Novgorod pass through Kalev's forged hooks and chains.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Pikk Street salt warehouses
integrations.status_1343: Long narrow warehouses for Hanseatic salt and herring.
integrations.beat: Kaja hides dispatches between salt barrels.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Ropewalk lane
integrations.status_1343: Long ropewalk supplying ship rigging.
integrations.beat: Captain Henning requisitions rope for watch boats here.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Shipwright's yard
integrations.status_1343: Boat repair slips for coastal traders.
integrations.beat: Forge nails and cleats are steady work for Kalev.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Novgorod merchant compound
integrations.status_1343: Eastern traders maintain a fenced yard near the harbor.
integrations.beat: Language and custom friction with Hanseatic Germans.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Fish market landing
integrations.status_1343: Morning herring and dried fish trade.
integrations.beat: Lower-town women barter news with fishermen from Viimsi.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Pikk Street chapel niche
integrations.status_1343: Stone niche with votive candles for sailors.
integrations.beat: Sailors vow offerings if they survive spring storms.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Merchant counting house
integrations.status_1343: Timber hall where factors settle letters of credit.
integrations.beat: Jürgen Witte ruins smaller rivals with delayed payments.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Harbor watch tower (early)
integrations.status_1343: Low stone lookout over the roadstead.
integrations.beat: First sight of rebel campfires is reported from here.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Packhouse lane
integrations.status_1343: Cart access for barrel and crate loading.
integrations.beat: Smuggled spearheads travel in 'empty' barrel returns.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|North Quarter (Pikk and Merchant Street)|Pikk Street well
integrations.status_1343: Fresh water for brewers and dyers.
integrations.beat: Aita draws water when her own well runs brackish.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|South Quarter (Knights and Karja Gate)|Rataskaevu Street well
integrations.status_1343: Functioning public well with local superstitions.
integrations.beat: Ellen Luik hears old songs whispered here at dusk.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|South Quarter (Knights and Karja Gate)|Karja Gate (Karja värav)
integrations.status_1343: Active gate in the Margaret Wall controlling exodus to Harju villages.
integrations.beat: Rebel couriers test Henning's patrol gaps at Karja.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|South Quarter (Knights and Karja Gate)|Knights' quarter lanes
integrations.status_1343: Houses of lesser knights and armorer workshops.
integrations.beat: Order retainers demand rush repairs before the siege.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|South Quarter (Knights and Karja Gate)|St. Michael's convent site
integrations.status_1343: Active convent precinct with church and cloister gardens.
integrations.beat: Aita trades ale for medicinal herbs from lay sisters.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|South Quarter (Knights and Karja Gate)|South wall tower (early)
integrations.status_1343: Timber-roofed tower on the Margaret Wall.
integrations.beat: Archers rotate here when rural signal fires are reported.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|South Quarter (Knights and Karja Gate)|Karja Street smithies
integrations.status_1343: Several competing smithies south of the market.
integrations.beat: Kalev undercuts rivals but refuses Order sword orders.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|South Quarter (Knights and Karja Gate)|South quarter tannery row
integrations.status_1343: Smelly but essential leather production downwind of residences.
integrations.beat: Mart hates delivering goods through the tannin stench.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|South Quarter (Knights and Karja Gate)|Stable yards near Karja
integrations.status_1343: Horse hire for messengers riding to Paide and Harju.
integrations.beat: Kaja requisitions a nag for a midnight run to the rebel camp.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|South Quarter (Knights and Karja Gate)|Lay brother dormitory lane
integrations.status_1343: Lodging for traveling clerics and poor pilgrims.
integrations.beat: Rural priests bring word of oath gatherings in Harju.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|South Quarter (Knights and Karja Gate)|South gate guardhouse
integrations.status_1343: Barracks for the Karja watch shift.
integrations.beat: Henning inspects this post personally after St. George's Night.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|South Quarter (Knights and Karja Gate)|Village road milestone
integrations.status_1343: Wooden post naming distances to Harju villages.
integrations.beat: Last point inside the wall where peasants may legally gather.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|South Quarter (Knights and Karja Gate)|Knight's chapel (minor)
integrations.status_1343: Private oratory for Order-affiliated households.
integrations.beat: Confession rumors leak to the lower town within a day.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)|Viru Gate (Viru värav)
integrations.section: East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)
integrations.status_1343: Functional gate in a shorter wall without elaborate foreworks.
integrations.beat: Captain Henning patrols this sector; Kaja smuggles messages past his watch.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)|Viru Street (Viru tänav)
integrations.section: East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)
integrations.status_1343: Busy retail lane with cloth and spice stalls.
integrations.beat: Ellen Luik buys linen here for birthing kits.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)|Eastern granary row
integrations.section: East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)
integrations.status_1343: Municipal grain stores against famine.
integrations.beat: Bread riots loom when granaries are rumored empty.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)|Viru barracks
integrations.section: East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)
integrations.status_1343: Barracks for the eastern watch company.
integrations.beat: Henning's sergeants drill recruits before the uprising.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)|Eastern market hall
integrations.section: East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)
integrations.status_1343: Covered stalls for pottery and coarse cloth.
integrations.beat: Mart picks up gossip from upland peddlers.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)|Coopers' lane
integrations.section: East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)
integrations.status_1343: Barrel makers supplying brewers and shippers.
integrations.beat: Aita's brewery depends on coopers for export ale.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)|Weavers' collective yard
integrations.section: East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)
integrations.status_1343: Shared loom house for lower-status weavers.
integrations.beat: Women trade route news while beating wool.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)|Eastern tenement courts
integrations.section: East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)
integrations.status_1343: Dense timber housing for laborers and apprentices.
integrations.beat: Overcrowding fuels sympathy for the rural rebels.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)|Viru Gate foreland
integrations.section: East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)
integrations.status_1343: Open marshy ground before the eastern approach road.
integrations.beat: Rebel envoys camp here under truce flags during parley.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)|Müürivahe (Wall Street)
integrations.section: East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)
integrations.status_1343: Saddlers and furriers in stalls hugging the curtain wall.
integrations.beat: Kalev buys leather here when Hanseatic stock is hoarded.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)|Eastern chapel of St. Bridget (lay)
integrations.section: East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)
integrations.status_1343: Lay devotional house, not the later Pirita convent.
integrations.beat: Pilgrims bring tales of burned manor houses in Harju.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)|Gate tax office
integrations.section: East Quarter (Lower Town East and Viru Gate)
integrations.status_1343: Clerks record tolls on incoming carts.
integrations.beat: Jürgen Witte bribes clerks to undervalue his imports.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Monastery Quarter (Dominican and St. Catherine's)|Dominican Monastery (St. Catherine's)
integrations.status_1343: Powerful active monastery (founded 1246) for education and brewing.
integrations.beat: Aita trades ale for exotic medicinal ingredients with the monks.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Monastery Quarter (Dominican and St. Catherine's)|St. Catherine's Church
integrations.status_1343: Convent church serving the Dominican sisters and lay students.
integrations.beat: Illuminated manuscripts copied here fetch high prices in Toompea.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Monastery Quarter (Dominican and St. Catherine's)|St. Catherine's Passage (Katariina käik)
integrations.status_1343: Covered walkway between monastery workshops and the church.
integrations.beat: Mart delivers forged hinges disguised as choir stall repairs.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Monastery Quarter (Dominican and St. Catherine's)|Monastery brewery
integrations.status_1343: Major beer production for city and export.
integrations.beat: Aita studies their recipes to keep her brewery competitive.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Monastery Quarter (Dominican and St. Catherine's)|Scriptorium wing
integrations.status_1343: Copyists produce charters and prayer books.
integrations.beat: Forged safe-conduct papers circulate from stolen blank pages.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Monastery Quarter (Dominican and St. Catherine's)|Monastery herb garden
integrations.status_1343: Walled garden for medicinal plants.
integrations.beat: Ellen Luik and Aita both source rare roots here.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Monastery Quarter (Dominican and St. Catherine's)|St. Nicholas Church (Niguliste kirik)
integrations.status_1343: Wealthy Hanseatic parish church, practically a fortress.
integrations.beat: Jürgen Witte stores sensitive contracts in secure crypts.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Monastery Quarter (Dominican and St. Catherine's)|Niguliste merchant tombs
integrations.status_1343: Patrician burials advertising Hanseatic wealth.
integrations.beat: Kalev sees the economic divide every time he delivers church ironwork.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Monastery Quarter (Dominican and St. Catherine's)|Monastery guesthouse
integrations.status_1343: Lodging for traveling clerics and students.
integrations.beat: Rural deacons bring news of the Four Kings' election.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Monastery Quarter (Dominican and St. Catherine's)|Lay brothers' workshop
integrations.status_1343: Wood and metal work for church maintenance.
integrations.beat: Kalev subcontracts rush jobs the monks cannot finish.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Monastery Quarter (Dominican and St. Catherine's)|Convent lane drainage
integrations.status_1343: Open ditches carrying dye and brewery waste.
integrations.beat: Neighbors complain to the Town Hall about monastery pollution.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Monastery Quarter (Dominican and St. Catherine's)|St. Catherine's well
integrations.status_1343: Convent water source for brewing and infirmary.
integrations.beat: A site of quiet meetings between Aita and a sympathetic lay sister.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Harbor and Foreshore|Great Coastal Gate descent
integrations.status_1343: Timber ramps for rolling barrels to waiting boats.
integrations.beat: Harbor master counts every cask leaving before the siege.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Harbor and Foreshore|North harbor quay
integrations.status_1343: Working quay for coastal cogs and fishing boats.
integrations.beat: Refugees from Harju manors arrive here seeking wall protection.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Harbor and Foreshore|South harbor slip
integrations.status_1343: Smaller slip for local craft and watch boats.
integrations.beat: Henning's patrol boat is hauled here for nail repairs by Kalev.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Harbor and Foreshore|Customs shed row
integrations.status_1343: Long sheds for inspecting Hanseatic manifests.
integrations.beat: Jürgen Witte's factors argue over tariff exemptions daily.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Harbor and Foreshore|Harbor signal mast
integrations.status_1343: Mast showing wind and arrival signals for captains.
integrations.beat: A lowered flag once meant plague ships - now it means rebel galleys.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Harbor and Foreshore|Boatbuilder's creek
integrations.status_1343: Muddy creek for caulking fishing boats.
integrations.beat: Boys fish here when watch patrols are thin.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Harbor and Foreshore|Tar boiling yard
integrations.status_1343: Open yard for pine tar used on hulls.
integrations.beat: Fire risk keeps Henning's watch extra close during dry weeks.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Harbor and Foreshore|Herring smokehouse
integrations.status_1343: Smoking sheds for preserving catch.
integrations.beat: Protein for the wall garrison during long sieges.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Harbor and Foreshore|Anchor forge outstation
integrations.status_1343: Satellite smithy for large harbor ironwork.
integrations.beat: Kalev dreams of graduating from hinges to anchors.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Harbor and Foreshore|Roadstead moorings
integrations.status_1343: Anchorage for larger Hanseatic cogs offshore.
integrations.beat: Merchants watch rebel fires on the mainland from their decks.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Harbor and Foreshore|Harbor chapel of St. Nicholas (seamen)
integrations.status_1343: Votive altar for fishermen and cog crews.
integrations.beat: Sailors swear oaths that leak to Kaja within hours.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|Harbor and Foreshore|Quarantine post
integrations.status_1343: Timber hut where sick crews wait offshore clearance.
integrations.beat: Used again when rumor says rebels poison wells.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Margaret Wall (general circuit)
integrations.status_1343: Main 13th-century stone wall ordered by Queen Margaret, shorter than later rebuilds.
integrations.beat: Every tower rotation is mapped by rebel sympathizers.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Nunna Tower
integrations.status_1343: Defensive tower with hoardings over Viru approaches.
integrations.beat: Archers' perch during the April alarm.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Sauna Tower
integrations.status_1343: Named for nearby bathhouses; watch post over south lanes.
integrations.beat: Henning doubles patrols here after curfew.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Kuldjala Tower
integrations.status_1343: Round tower segment on the north wall.
integrations.beat: Merchants bribe guards for after-hours crane access visible from here.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Loewenschede Tower
integrations.status_1343: Tower guarding a bend toward the harbor.
integrations.beat: Weak mortar noted by rebel scouts in Kaja's reports.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Epping Tower
integrations.status_1343: Early tower later incorporated into rebuilds.
integrations.beat: A collapsed parapet becomes a ladder point in rebel plans.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Harju Gate (Harju värav)
integrations.status_1343: Gate controlling the road to Harju and Padise.
integrations.beat: Peasants flee inward when manor houses burn.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Lühike jalg wall bend
integrations.status_1343: Sharp corner where attackers lose cover.
integrations.beat: Danish crossbowmen train on straw targets below.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Pikk jalg wall stairs
integrations.status_1343: Stone stairs under constant surveillance.
integrations.beat: Smugglers rarely succeed here; Kaja uses bribes instead.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Wall patrol walkway
integrations.status_1343: Timber catwalk behind parapets.
integrations.beat: Watch sergeants log every lantern extinguished after curfew.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Moat section (east)
integrations.status_1343: Shallow ditch, partly wet, before Viru Gate.
integrations.beat: Fills with rubbish unless cleaned before sieges.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Moat section (south)
integrations.status_1343: Drier ditch used as vegetable plots by neighbors.
integrations.beat: Hidden caches of spear shafts buried under cabbage rows.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Gate portcullis groove (Viru)
integrations.status_1343: Working portcullis and murder hole.
integrations.beat: Tested weekly; rebels note the squeal of rusted chains.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Wall lime kiln
integrations.status_1343: Kiln producing mortar for ongoing wall repairs.
integrations.beat: Kalev supplies iron fittings for the kiln winch.

integrations.catalog_key: tallinn|City Walls, Towers, and Gates|Beacon basket site
integrations.status_1343: Basket for tar-soaked signals to warn of land attack.
integrations.beat: Lit on April 23 when countryside rises.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Ülemiste Lake (Ülemiste järv)
integrations.status_1343: Vital freshwater lake; local belief says the lake spirit grants the city water.
integrations.beat: Site of the May 14, 1343 Battle of Sõjamäe on its shores.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Sõjamäe battlefield site
integrations.status_1343: Open fields and marsh edge where the main rebel army is crushed.
integrations.beat: Decisive Order victory ends the mainland rising near Reval.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Kanavere Bog
integrations.status_1343: Marshland where rebels win a brief victory on May 11, 1343.
integrations.beat: Boosts rebel morale before Sõjamäe disaster.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Rebel signal hill (Harju)
integrations.status_1343: Hilltop bonfire on St. George's Night triggers the uprising.
integrations.beat: The Four Kings' election follows the first flames.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Harju village crossroads
integrations.status_1343: Farm hamlets supplying grain and labor to Reval.
integrations.beat: Kaja's family ties make her trusted on these roads.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Viimsi coast
integrations.status_1343: Fishing hamlets and salt evaporation pans.
integrations.beat: Fish reach Reval markets within hours of catch.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Jägala River crossing
integrations.status_1343: Important ford and mill sites on the road east.
integrations.beat: Rebel bands ambush Order messengers near the ford.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Keila stronghold site
integrations.status_1343: Wooden fort and manor controlling western Harju.
integrations.beat: Local knights flee to Reval when peasants rise.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Harku manor lands
integrations.status_1343: Agricultural estate worked by taxed Estonian families.
integrations.beat: Burned steads send refugees toward the city walls.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Saku forest paths
integrations.status_1343: Timber and charcoal for city forges.
integrations.beat: Hidden rebel messengers use charcoal routes to avoid roads.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Lake Harku
integrations.status_1343: Fishing and reed harvesting for the capital.
integrations.beat: Ellen Luik knows old songs about lake offerings here.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Maardu salt marsh
integrations.status_1343: Coastal flats for salt and grazing.
integrations.beat: Salt pans rival Hanseatic imports when trade is blocked.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Lagedi manor site
integrations.status_1343: Knight's holding on the road toward Viru.
integrations.beat: First manor torched in the county during the uprising.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Anija crossing
integrations.status_1343: Ferry and ford on routes to the east.
integrations.beat: Rebel kings move troops across before Kanavere.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Harju County (Reval hinterland)|Raasiku woodlands
integrations.status_1343: Hunting preserves of the German nobility.
integrations.beat: Peasants poach deer when lords flee to castles.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Rakvere Castle
integrations.status_1343: Order-affiliated stronghold over Viru roads.
integrations.beat: Garrison sorties threaten rebel flanks in Harju.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Kunda limestone cliffs
integrations.status_1343: Quarries supplying stone to Reval builders.
integrations.beat: Kalev's limestone tools come from similar beds.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Toolse castle ruins
integrations.status_1343: Teutonic coastal fort watching the Gulf.
integrations.beat: Signals mirror those on Harju hills during alerts.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Narva River crossing
integrations.status_1343: Strategic ford and castle on the eastern trade route.
integrations.beat: Distant but vital for Novgorod trade rumors in Reval.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Padise Cistercian Monastery
integrations.status_1343: Wealthy monastery with farms and mill rights.
integrations.beat: Monks negotiate neutrality when peasants burn nearby manors.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Haapsalu Bishop's Castle
integrations.status_1343: Seat of the Ösel-Wiek bishopric on the west coast.
integrations.beat: Clerical authority competes with Order power.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Paldiski coastal road junction
integrations.status_1343: Small harbor and road node west of Reval.
integrations.beat: Padise monks and merchants use this route.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Keila-Joa waterfall
integrations.status_1343: Mill site on the Keila River.
integrations.beat: Millers spread news faster than official riders.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Lahemaa forest villages
integrations.status_1343: Sparse hamlets under noble hunting rights.
integrations.beat: Coastal smoke seen from watchtowers warns of distant raids.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Käsmu captain's village
integrations.status_1343: Boatmen know Gulf currents and hidden coves.
integrations.beat: Fishermen bring mainland gossip to Reval harbor.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Vihula manor site
integrations.status_1343: Knight's economic base on the Viru road.
integrations.beat: Abandoned when serfs rise during St. George's Night.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Tapa crossroads
integrations.status_1343: Medieval road junction toward Rakvere and Viru.
integrations.beat: Rebel couriers choose paths here to dodge patrols.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Loksa coast
integrations.status_1343: Minor fishing and timber landing.
integrations.beat: Order boats resupply from here during sieges.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Lihula stronghold site
integrations.status_1343: Local power center in western Estonia.
integrations.beat: Bishopric influence meets Order garrisons.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Northern Estonia (Viru and Lääne)|Noarootsi churches
integrations.status_1343: Early Christian wooden churches on coastal Swedes' lands.
integrations.beat: Coastal communities hear of the uprising by boat.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Central Estonia (Järvamaa and Paide)|Paide Castle (Ordensburg)
integrations.status_1343: Key Order stronghold in central Estonia.
integrations.beat: The Four Kings are lured here and executed under truce.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Central Estonia (Järvamaa and Paide)|Paide town walls
integrations.status_1343: Modest fortifications around the market.
integrations.beat: Refugees crowd inside when countryside burns.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Central Estonia (Järvamaa and Paide)|Järva-Jaani crossroads
integrations.status_1343: Parish center on roads between Paide and Reval.
integrations.beat: Priests debate whether to bless rebel oaths.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Central Estonia (Järvamaa and Paide)|Elistvere mill site
integrations.status_1343: Watermill on central Estonian streams.
integrations.beat: Grain shortages reach here before city markets spike.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Central Estonia (Järvamaa and Paide)|Aravete limestone quarry
integrations.status_1343: Building stone for churches and walls.
integrations.beat: Paused when laborers join the rising.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Central Estonia (Järvamaa and Paide)|Koeru forest camps
integrations.status_1343: Rebel bands hide in central woods after local victories.
integrations.beat: Temporary camps feed men marching to Paide.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Central Estonia (Järvamaa and Paide)|Võhma ford
integrations.status_1343: River crossing on southbound roads.
integrations.beat: Order patrols tax carts fleeing the rebellion.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Central Estonia (Järvamaa and Paide)|Imavere manor lands
integrations.status_1343: Grain estates supplying Paide garrison.
integrations.beat: Torched barns signal widening unrest.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Central Estonia (Järvamaa and Paide)|Roosna-Alliku chapel
integrations.status_1343: Wooden parish church on a hill.
integrations.beat: Bell rung backward warns villages of approaching knights.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Central Estonia (Järvamaa and Paide)|Türi windmill ridge
integrations.status_1343: Windmills on a ridge visible for miles.
integrations.beat: Used as rally points when signal fires are lit.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Central Estonia (Järvamaa and Paide)|Järva county sacred grove
integrations.status_1343: Pre-Christian sacred groves still respected.
integrations.beat: Ellen Luik's songs reference oaths sworn at hiis stones.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Central Estonia (Järvamaa and Paide)|Mäo hillfort site
integrations.status_1343: Ancient fort inspiring rebel leadership symbols.
integrations.beat: Invoked in speeches by the Four Kings.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Tartu (Dorpat) Cathedral Hill
integrations.status_1343: Bishopric town with cathedral and market; contested in 1343 unrest.
integrations.beat: News from Dorpat reaches Hanseatic merchants in Reval.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Tartu stone bridge site
integrations.status_1343: Wooden bridge and toll point on the east road.
integrations.beat: Controls trade between Livonia and Pskov.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Viljandi Order Castle
integrations.status_1343: Major Order fortress in southern Estonia.
integrations.beat: Sends knights north when Harju rebels threaten Livonia.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Viljandi town market
integrations.status_1343: Regional market for grain and livestock.
integrations.beat: Prices spike when Reval harbor is blockaded by fear.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Pärnu (Pernau) port
integrations.status_1343: Hanseatic port on the southwestern coast.
integrations.beat: Alternative sea gate when Reval is unsettled.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Pärnu river mouth fort
integrations.status_1343: Timber and earth works guarding the harbor.
integrations.beat: Bishopric and Order share garrison duties.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Otepää hillfort
integrations.status_1343: Strong hilltop associated with early Estonian resistance memory.
integrations.beat: Symbolic rally point for southern sympathizers.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Karula lakes
integrations.status_1343: Remote farms and fishing lakes.
integrations.beat: Far from Order centers; oaths spread quietly.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Võru parish churches
integrations.status_1343: Isolated parishes with late conversion.
integrations.beat: Preserve older funeral songs Ellen Luik knows.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Suure-Jaani church
integrations.status_1343: Medieval parish church in fertile Järvamaa south.
integrations.beat: Bell tower used to warn of passing knights.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Karksi castle site
integrations.status_1343: Noble stronghold overlooking the valley.
integrations.beat: Abandoned when villeins rise.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Halliste meadow ford
integrations.status_1343: Marsh crossing toward Pärnu.
integrations.beat: Rebels use bog paths Order horses refuse.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Mooste castle site
integrations.status_1343: Small fortified manor in southeastern Estonia.
integrations.beat: Local knight flees after St. George's Night.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Rõuge lake district
integrations.status_1343: Remote settlements with strong local identity.
integrations.beat: Barely touched by city politics until refugees arrive.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Sangaste manor lands
integrations.status_1343: Agricultural estate on southern roads.
integrations.beat: Grain requisitioned for Order campaigns.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Helme castle hill
integrations.status_1343: Border fortress toward Livonia.
integrations.beat: Watches roads from rebellious Harju.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Põltsamaa river castle site
integrations.status_1343: River stronghold controlling central trade.
integrations.beat: Neutral ground for clergy mediating truces.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Emajõgi river mills
integrations.status_1343: Milling cluster powering bishopric revenues.
integrations.beat: Idle when millers join rebel bands.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Vastseliina castle ruins
integrations.status_1343: Eastern Livonian fortress near Pskov routes.
integrations.beat: Rumors of Russian interference pass through here.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Southern Estonia (Tartu, Viljandi, Pärnu)|Antsla valley manors
integrations.status_1343: Scattered knight holdings in Võru county.
integrations.beat: Isolated enough to survive the first April fires.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Kuressaare Castle (Arensburg)
integrations.status_1343: Seat of the Saaremaa bishop with thick walls.
integrations.beat: Island politics stay cautious while mainland burns.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Pöide Church fortress
integrations.status_1343: Church built like a stronghold in eastern Saaremaa.
integrations.beat: Local lords shelter behind thick stone during unrest.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Kaali meteorite craters
integrations.status_1343: Sacred lake and crater revered in local tradition.
integrations.beat: Folklore links fire from the sky to omen-reading before battles.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Angla windmill hill
integrations.status_1343: Windmill ridge for island grain.
integrations.beat: Grain prices affect ferry traffic to Reval.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Kihelkonna church
integrations.status_1343: Important church controlling western Saaremaa.
integrations.beat: Records tithes that spark peasant resentment.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Vilsandi seal coast
integrations.status_1343: Seal hunting and fishing grounds.
integrations.beat: Boats bring island news to mainland harbors.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Kuressaare town harbor
integrations.status_1343: Island port trading with Reval and Pärnu.
integrations.beat: Ferry captains spread exaggerated siege tales.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Maasilinn castle site
integrations.status_1343: Early castle site on Saaremaa.
integrations.beat: Legends of ancient kings invoked by rebel poets.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Kõpu lighthouse site
integrations.status_1343: Early navigation fire on Hiiumaa's highest hill.
integrations.beat: Guides coastal traffic around dangerous shoals.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Hiiumaa Käina church ruins
integrations.status_1343: Parish church lost to the sea later; active in 1343.
integrations.beat: Fishermen vow saints' aid before storm season.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Kärdla smith tradition
integrations.status_1343: Island metalwork for ships and farms.
integrations.beat: Island smiths rival mainland prices in harbor markets.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Sõrve peninsula fishing villages
integrations.status_1343: Cod and herring fleets.
integrations.beat: First to see sails from Riga or Reval.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Muhu island crossing
integrations.status_1343: Ferry between Saaremaa and mainland.
integrations.beat: Strategic choke for island militia.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Valjala church
integrations.status_1343: Early stone church center for the island.
integrations.beat: Baptism records prove who owes labor to bishops.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Lihula (Saare) manor coast
integrations.status_1343: Bishopric farmsteads.
integrations.beat: Serfs withhold grain when mainland rebels win at Kanavere.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Hiiumaa Suuremõisa lands
integrations.status_1343: Feudal estate on the big island.
integrations.beat: Timber for ships requisitioned during alerts.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Saaremaa sacred stones
integrations.status_1343: Pre-Christian stones still honored.
integrations.beat: Ellen Luik's tradition of lake and stone vows extends here.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Western Islands (Saaremaa and Hiiumaa)|Panga cliff
integrations.status_1343: Sacrificial cliff in folk memory.
integrations.beat: Used in stories warning against betraying oaths.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Eastern borderlands and Narva region|Narva Hermann Castle
integrations.status_1343: Teutonic castle guarding the Narva crossing.
integrations.beat: Trade envy between Reval and Narva merchants.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Eastern borderlands and Narva region|Ivangorod opposite bank
integrations.status_1343: Novgorod sphere settlement across the river.
integrations.beat: Smugglers move goods when Livonia is at war.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Eastern borderlands and Narva region|Lake Peipus north shore
integrations.status_1343: Vast lake fisheries and Orthodox villages.
integrations.beat: Different faith and custom from Reval Germans.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Eastern borderlands and Narva region|Kallaste Orthodox village
integrations.status_1343: Eastern Christian fishing community.
integrations.beat: Pilgrims bring icons that fascinate lower-town children.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Eastern borderlands and Narva region|Mustvee harbor
integrations.status_1343: Boat trade across Peipus.
integrations.beat: Grain from the east bypasses Hanseatic tolls.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Eastern borderlands and Narva region|Alutaguse forest
integrations.status_1343: Hunting and beekeeping lands.
integrations.beat: Refuge for families fleeing burned manors.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Eastern borderlands and Narva region|Vasknarva castle site
integrations.status_1343: Small fort on the Narva river route.
integrations.beat: Contested in earlier wars; garrisoned lightly in 1343.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Eastern borderlands and Narva region|Toolamaa hill villages
integrations.status_1343: Mixed agriculture and forest.
integrations.beat: Signal fires visible to both Narva and Rakvere.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Eastern borderlands and Narva region|Agusalu marsh
integrations.status_1343: Difficult terrain slowing Order cavalry.
integrations.beat: Rebels mimic Kanavere tactics in smaller skirmishes.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Eastern borderlands and Narva region|Jõhvi parish church
integrations.status_1343: Wooden parish church serving mining and farm villages.
integrations.beat: Miners spread rumors of wealth hidden from the Order.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks|Sacred Grove (Hiis) near Reval south road
integrations.section: Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks
integrations.landmark: Sacred Grove (Hiis) near Reval south road
integrations.status_1343: Traditional grove where oaths were sworn before Christian courts.
integrations.beat: Kalev's reflection scenes echo hiis taboos.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks|Järvi Maarja sacred spring
integrations.section: Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks
integrations.status_1343: Healing spring in Harju woods.
integrations.beat: Ellen Luik collects water for difficult births.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks|Keila sacred grove
integrations.section: Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks
integrations.status_1343: Hiis site west of the capital.
integrations.beat: Peasants avoid cutting timber here even when desperate.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks|Pagan burial mounds (Tarand-graves)
integrations.section: Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks
integrations.status_1343: Iron Age stone graves across Estonia.
integrations.beat: Invoked as proof Estonians held the land before knights.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks|Soomaa flooded meadows
integrations.section: Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks
integrations.status_1343: Seasonal floodplains in central Estonia.
integrations.beat: Natural barrier for rebel retreats.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks|Endla bog
integrations.section: Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks
integrations.status_1343: Remote peat bog with hidden paths.
integrations.beat: Order patrols lose tracks in mist here.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks|Taevaskoja sandstone outcrop
integrations.section: Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks
integrations.status_1343: River cliffs and caves in older folklore.
integrations.beat: Storytellers link cliffs to ancient spirits.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks|Piusa sandstone caves
integrations.section: Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks
integrations.status_1343: Wind-carved caves in southeastern forests.
integrations.beat: Shelter for fugitives after Sõjamäe.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks|Suur Munamägi hill
integrations.section: Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks
integrations.status_1343: Forest hill on the Latvian border.
integrations.beat: Visibility post for distant signal fires in legend.

integrations.catalog_key: estonia|Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks|Võrtsjärv lake
integrations.section: Sacred sites, forests, and natural landmarks
integrations.status_1343: Fishing and ferry lake in southern Estonia.
integrations.beat: Connected to Viljandi trade routes.
